projectDescription: A GitHub Action that automates Go project releases using GoReleaser, supporting both open-source and Pro distributions with checksum and cosign signature verification.
keyFeatures: Automated GoReleaser installation and execution in GitHub Actions workflows
Support for both goreleaser (OSS) and goreleaser-pro distributions
Automatic checksum verification of downloaded GoReleaser archives
Optional cosign sigstore signature verification for enhanced supply chain security
Flexible version pinning via semver constraints or .tool-versions file
Configurable working directory and pass-through argument support
Install-only mode to make goreleaser available as a CLI tool in subsequent steps
Structured JSON outputs for artifacts and build metadata
publicApiSurface: output: artifacts (JSON array of build artifacts)
